name: How is fault determined if an AI search glitch tanked my law firm visibility?
description: Platform not liable; user verifies AI outputs.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined if an AI search glitch tanked my law firm visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Platform not liable; user verifies AI outputs.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Fault requires proving negligence or intent by platform; users bear AI input risks.[1][3] Courts fault users for unverified AI.[3] Key factors: platform terms disclaim liability, user due diligence.[1] Review TOS, log glitches with timestamps, fault unlikely.[1] Platform rarely at fault.
